question: Which one of the following is true about the lighting in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The lighting is harsh and bright. (B) The lighting is dim and low. (C) The lighting is warm and cozy. (D) The lighting is natural and coming from the windows.
gold_answer: The lighting is natural and coming from the windows
answer_choices: The lighting is harsh and bright
The lighting is dim and low
The lighting is warm and cozy
The lighting is natural and coming from the windows
